title: god armor
description: A powerful Minecraft Fabric mod that adds divine god armor, weapons, custom crafting recipes and special abilities inspired by heavenly warriors
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PK-FUoqpueQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe># ✨ God Armor Mod




Become a true divine warrior with the ultimate God Armor set!

This mod adds a powerful heavenly armor inspired by angels and gods.
The set features divine power, epic visuals, and overpowered equipment.

## ⚠️ Current Version

At the moment, the armor still uses Netherite armor textures and models.
Right now the mod mainly changes:

* item names
* crafting recipes
* abilities and stats

A full custom armor design may come in future updates.

## 🪽 Features

* God Armor set
* Divine Sword
* Strong effects and buffs
* Better survival experience
* Fantasy god-style gameplay

## ⚡ Abilities

* Super protection
* Increased strength
* Speed boost
* Fire resistance
* Extra health
* ✈️ With a full armor set, you can fly in survival mode

## 🔥 Included

* God Helmet
* God Chestplate
* God Leggings
* God Boots
* Divine Sword

## 📖 Recommended

Using JEI (Just Enough Items) is highly recommended to easily view all crafting recipes and items added by the mod.

## 🚀 Future Updates

A major update is planned in about a month.
There is a good chance the armor will receive a completely new custom design inspired by divine golden armor with wings and glowing effects.

## 🎮 Supported Versions

* Minecraft Fabric 1.21.11

## 👑 Become a God

Put on the armor and dominate your world with heavenly power — and soar through the skies with the full set!
